# Reteplase 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Reteplase 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Reteplase</strong> 目前有 <strong>1 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Reteplase 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rapilysin is indicated for the thrombolytic treatment of suspected myocardial infarction with persistent ST elevation or recent left bundle branch block within 12 hours after the onset of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>myocardial infarction（99.9%）</li>
<li>coronary thrombosis（99.9%）</li>
<li>posteroinferior myocardial infarction（99.9%）</li>
<li>posterolateral myocardial infarction（99.9%）</li>
<li>septal myocardial infarction（99.9%）</li>
<li>congenital coronary artery anomaly（99.8%）</li>
<li>hemoglobinopathy（99.7%）</li>
<li>coronary stenosis（99.6%）</li>
<li>myocardial infarction (disease)（99.6%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（99.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/reteplase/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
